title_en: For $4,550, Would You Buy a Single Premium Watch or a Swarm of Affordable Ones?
title_zh: 如果你有4,550美元，你会买一块单一的高端机械表，还是一串平价手表？
rubric_en: You could go all in on one pricey, luxe watch or assemble a collection of lower-budget timepieces. Let’s crunch the numbers.
rubric_zh: 你可以把预算全部压在一块昂贵的奢华手表上，也可以组建一套更实惠的表款集合。让我们算一笔账。

paragraphs.en: Watch geeks love the phrase “GADA watch,” meaning a “go anywhere, do anything” timepiece—something both feature-rich and eye-catching, a rugged and durable watch that doesn't compromise on style.
paragraphs.zh: 表迷们都很喜欢“GADA手表”这个说法，意思是“去任何地方、做任何事”都合适的腕表——既功能丰富、又醒目时尚，具备耐用坚固的特质，同时不在风格上妥协。

paragraphs.en: Here at WIRED, a related question has been floating around the Gear desk for some time. What’s better, one all-rounder premium watch, or a varied collection garnered for exactly the same cash outlay as that piece that also covers every scenario?
paragraphs.zh: 在WIRED，我们的Gear栏目里这个问题讨论了有一阵子。哪种更好：一块全能型高端表，还是用同样一笔预算买一组不同用途、也能覆盖所有场景的手表？

paragraphs.en: Determined to answer this horological conundrum once and for all, WIRED set the same budget for each approach to find out. Let's start with our pick for a GADA timepiece.
paragraphs.zh: 为了彻底解答这个计时器领域的难题，WIRED给两种方案都设定了同样的预算来比较。我们先从精选的一款GADA腕表开始。

paragraphs.en: Watch fans can never really be satisfied with one watch. We love to pretend that there is a “holy grail” or “exit watch” out there, but really there’s no end to this journey. However, we also love to argue, and one permanent conversation starter is the concept of a one-and-done.
paragraphs.zh: 手表爱好者几乎从来不会被一块表满足。我们总喜欢自我安慰，仿佛世上有一块“圣杯”或“终极退出表”能一劳永逸，但其实这条路永无止境。可我们也爱争论，而“买一块就够”这一观念，常常是永久的话题开场白。

paragraphs.en: It can’t be too high-end, for the true GADA watch must be something you can wear on a hike and in the pool, as well as to a formal function. Ideally, you’d be able to wear it around a major city without fear of theft, which rules out pretty much any Rolex, but we’d still want it to be something you can take pride in among horological snobs.
paragraphs.zh: 它不能太高端，因为真正值得入手的GADA手表应该是一款既能在徒步时戴，也能下水时戴，还能出席正式场合的手表。理想情况下，你要能在大城市里安心佩戴而不怕被盗，这几乎直接把Rolex排除了，但我们仍希望它在钟表发烧友面前能让人自豪。

paragraphs.en: Some brands make this kind of sweet spot their comfort zone. We considered the Nomos Glashütte Club Sport Worldtimer, or a Longines Spirit Zulu Time—both brands with an eye on value, a reputation for quality, and an all-around approach to design that’s not too polarizing.
paragraphs.zh: 有些品牌将这种“甜蜜点”作为自己的舒适区。我们考虑了Nomos Glashütte Club Sport Worldtimer，或Longines Spirit Zulu Time——这两个品牌都注重性价比，拥有优质口碑，且在设计上采取的是全面、不过于极端的取向。

paragraphs.en: Inevitably, your one watch isn’t going to be able to do everything. It won’t be as chic as a Cartier or pack a pedigree chronograph. But rest assured it’ll have you covered 95 percent of the time.
paragraphs.zh: 毕竟，一只手表不可能包办一切。它不会像Cartier那样时髦，也不会拥有名门血统的计时码表功能。但可以放心，它会在95%的场景中满足你的需求。

paragraphs.en: In the end, we settled on a Tudor Black Bay GMT, on a fabric or leather strap. For $4,550, you get a 41-mm stainless-steel piece with 200 meters of water resistance, a COSC-certified chronometer movement that’s actually descended from the last generation of Rolex GMT movements, and a design that’s smart enough to blend into most formal outfits, even though it’s most at home in more casual settings.
paragraphs.zh: 最终，我们选定了Tudor Black Bay GMT，配织物或皮革表带。花4550美元，你可以拥有一只41毫米的不锈钢款，具备200米防水、通过COSC认证的计时器机芯——这套机芯实际上源自Rolex GMT机芯的最后一代——以及足够聪明的设计，能够融入大多数正式装束，尽管它在更休闲的场合里显得最得心应手。

paragraphs.en: With the dual time zone functionality it’s a useful travel tool, too, and Tudor’s brand name and build quality mean it’s respected by watch geeks the world over.
paragraphs.zh: 凭借双时区功能，它同样也是一个实用的出行工具，而且 Tudor 的品牌名气和做工质量使其受到全世界表迷的尊敬。

paragraphs.en: That’s what we’re up against. Can we build a dream team to rival the Tudor for the same cash outlay?
paragraphs.zh: 这就是我们所面对的问题。我们能否用同样的支出组建一支梦之队来匹敌 Tudor？

paragraphs.en: First stop on our shopping list is a dive watch: something that can at least match the Black Bay’s 200-meter water resistance rating and speak to its underpinnings as a daily diver. We don’t need a hardcore dive monster, but something that blends style and spec. We could head to Seiko, but while the Prospex range holds a lot of phenomenal beaters, few could be said to be truly stylish.
paragraphs.zh: 我们购物清单的第一站是潜水表：至少要能匹配 Black Bay 的 200 米防水等级，并体现其日常潜水表的底层设定。我们不需要一只硬核的深潜猛兽，只要能兼顾风格与参数的一款即可。我们可以去看 Seiko，但尽管 Prospex 系列有不少表现出色的强悍选手，很少有能说得上既有型又时髦的。

paragraphs.en: One strong candidate is the Unimatic U1 Classic ($665), but we’ve gone for the recently updated Baltic Aquascaphe ($730). Powered by a Miyota automatic movement, the Baltic focuses on more visible premium touches, like the domed sapphire crystal and applied 3D luminous hour markers. It’s water-resistant to 200 meters and available in blue, green, gray, or silver.
paragraphs.zh: 一个很强的候选是 Unimatic U1 Classic（$665），但我们改选了近期更新的 Baltic Aquascaphe（$730）。该表采用 Miyota 自动机芯，Baltic 更强调更显眼的高级细节，例如穹顶形蓝宝石水晶和镶嵌的三维夜光时标。它的防水深度为 200 米，并有蓝色、绿色、灰色或银色可选。

paragraphs.en: Next we should hit one of the main weaknesses in the Tudor’s armor, and pick up a dress watch. The Black Bay isn’t hulking, and our choice to opt for the fabric strap makes the whole watch a lot lighter (although it does add a millimeter in height), but it’s not slim by any definition.
paragraphs.zh: 接下来我们要触及 Tudor 最主要的一个短板，并挑一块正装表。黑湾款并不笨重，而且我们选择了织物表带后，整只表也轻了很多（尽管高度上增加了约一毫米），但它严格来说并不算纤薄。

paragraphs.en: For price and poise, we’ve come straight to Dennison. The one time you can really get away with a quartz watch is at a formal occasion, where the chance of someone asking you for precision timing or to fiddle with your complications will be pretty low. The sold-out Time+Tide Date Night limited edition would be perfect, but failing that we’ll opt for the Midnight Aventurine in steel ($690).
paragraphs.zh: 在性价比和优雅感上，我们直接看向 Dennison。要说石英表能真正派上用场，通常只有在正式场合最合适，因为有人向你索要精确计时或请你摆弄复杂功能的概率会很低。售罄的 Time+Tide Date Night 限量版会是最佳选择，但既然买不到，我们就选钢款的 Midnight Aventurine（690 美元）。

paragraphs.en: Next, we’ve got space in our collection for a real everyday watch: something that’s not overburdened with functionality, but that will cover us for the working day. Here we can look at a simple automatic from Hamilton, whose military-inspired Khaki Field and Pilot watches would also be worthy inclusions. However, for a more everyday staple we’ve gone for the Khaki Field “Murph” 38 mm ($995), a compact version of the watch Matthew McConaughey's character gives to his daughter in Interstellar. With an 80-hour power reserve and 100-meter water resistance, it’s a versatile choice in its own right.
paragraphs.zh: 接着，我们的收藏里需要一块真正的日常手表：不是那种功能过于堆叠的表，而是足以应付工作日的表。我们可以考虑 Hamilton 的一款简约自动机械表，它们的军旅风格 Khaki Field 和 Pilot 系列也都值得列入清单。然而，为了让它更像日常刚需，我们选择了 Khaki Field “Murph” 38 毫米（995 美元），这是电影《星际穿越》中 Matthew McConaughey 角色送给女儿的那款表的紧凑版。它拥有 80 小时动力储备和 100 米防水深度，本身就是一款用途很广的选择。

paragraphs.en: To be a viable alternative to our GADA Tudor, the value collection has to include a travel-time watch. We looked at Farer’s 36-mm Lander IV, with its preppy color scheme and distinctive character, but ultimately we went for another cult favorite from the affordable end of the Swatch Group stable.
paragraphs.zh: 要想成为我们这款 GADA Tudor 的可行替代，价值款系列就必须包含一块世界时功能手表。我们看中了 Farer 的 36 毫米 Lander IV，这款表有学院派的配色和鲜明个性，但最终我们还是选择了 Swatch 集团中高性价比阵营的另一款“小众爆款”。

paragraphs.en: The Mido Ocean Star Decompression Worldtimer costs $5 less than the Farer, at $1,490, and brings its own eye-catching dial to the table, as well as a 200-meter water resistance rating and a version of the same 80-hour movement as in the Hamilton. Perhaps the clincher was the world-time bezel, which shouldn’t be confused with a true mechanical world-time complication, but does give at-a-glance timekeeping around the world.
paragraphs.zh: Mido Ocean Star Decompression Worldtimer 的售价比 Farer 低 5 美元，定价为 1,490 美元。它同样带来了自己吸睛的表盘，以及 200 米防水等级，并采用与 Hamilton 相同机芯的 80 小时版本。也许最关键的是它的世界时刻度环，这个功能不要与真正的机械世界时复杂功能混淆，但它确实可以让你一眼看出世界各地的时间。

paragraphs.en: So far we’ve spent $3,905, which means we still have $645 burning a hole in our pocket. The obvious gap in this collection is a chronograph of some kind. It would give us the decisive edge over the Black Bay, but for this budget most mechanical chronographs are out of reach. We could buy a MoonSwatch—in fact, at $285 we could buy two and have enough left for the Uber home—but we’re on our mission to find something more substantial, more interesting, and (let’s face it) more likely to stand the test of time.
paragraphs.zh: 到目前为止我们已经花了 3,905 美元，也就是说口袋里还“有”645 美元的空档。这个组合里明显缺少的是一种计时码表（chronograph）。它会让我们在与 Black Bay 的对比中更有决定性优势，但在这个预算下，大多数机械计时码表都买不起。我们可以买一只 MoonSwatch——事实上，285 美元就可以买两只，还能留点钱叫辆 Uber 回家——但我们现在的目标是找一款更有分量、更有趣，而且（说实话）更有可能经得起时间考验的选择。

paragraphs.en: And that something is the Brew Super Metric ($475), a hybrid mecha-quartz chrono from a New York microbrand with more personality than every MoonSwatch put together. The unashamedly loud retro styling isn’t for everyone, but we think that the cushion-shaped case and steel bracelet help broaden our stylistic options, and although it’s not a pedigree mechanical chronograph, it costs less than $500 while looking and feeling like no one’s idea of a compromise.
paragraphs.zh: 而那件“更有意思”的东西是 Brew Super Metric（475 美元），这是一款来自纽约的微型品牌机芯混合计时码表，个性远胜于所有 MoonSwatch 加在一起。它那不加掩饰的大胆复古造型并不适合每个人，但我们认为方垫形表壳和钢制表链条能拓宽我们的风格选择，而且虽然它不是正统的机械计时码表，价格却低于 500 美元，同时看起来和手感都不像“妥协”的选择。

paragraphs.en: That brings the challengers to a grand total of $4,380, which means we’d be able to buy a six-watch case to keep our collection in (of course it’s got space for one more …) and maybe even a couple of spare straps.
paragraphs.zh: 这样一来，竞争组合的总金额是 4,380 美元，这意味着我们不仅可以买一个六只表的表盒来收纳这套表（当然它还剩一个位置……），甚至还可能再留几条备用表带。

paragraphs.en: There’s no doubt the Tudor is in a different league, but could a crack squad of specialists tempt you to part with $4,550? Or will the lure of singular luxe prove too tempting? Over to you. It's decision time.
paragraphs.zh: 毫无疑问，图德（Tudor）处于完全不同的级别，但一支“专家小队”般的平价腕表阵容，是否也能让你心动到愿意掏出 4,550 美元？还是说单一奢华的吸引力会更胜一筹？由你来决定。该做选择了。
